overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing the protagonist traversing a rocky mountain landscape. The scene begins in clear overcast weather within a narrow canyon, transitions to open hillside with distant views, and ends with heavy rain reducing visibility as the character continues uphill.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon path with chiral crystal deposits

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow canyon carrying large cargo container on back

entered.detail: steep layered rock wall forming the left boundary of the canyon
weathered rock pillars and outcroppings on the right side
glowing blue crystalline deposits on the ground near the path
distant mountain peaks visible through gaps in the canyon walls

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky canyon with steep cliff faces on the left and layered rock formations on the right. Blue chiral crystals are visible on the ground near the path, and snow-capped peaks are visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open mountain hillside with panoramic valley views

events.description: exits narrow canyon into expansive open mountain landscape

agents.ego_description: traversing open hillside with expansive views of distant mountain ranges

entered.detail: wide valley opening visible between the mountain ranges
large rocks and stone debris scattered across the hillside

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the canyon, the landscape opens to reveal expansive views of distant snow-capped mountains and wide valleys. The path continues along the hillside with grassy patches and scattered rocks as the cliff face recedes into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: rain-swept mountain path with Timefall corrosion

events.description: heavy rain begins falling rapidly reducing visibility
ambient light dims significantly as storm clouds darken the sky

agents.ego_description: continuing uphill through heavy rain with reduced visibility and slippery terrain

entered.detail: sparse twisted trees lining the path on the left side
heavy rainfall creating water droplets on the camera lens and misty atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The weather shifts dramatically as heavy rain begins to fall, reducing visibility and darkening the scene. The character continues walking uphill past sparse, gnarled trees while the rain creates a misty atmosphere over the rocky terrain, with distant mountains barely visible through the haze.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rugged mountain landscape that transforms from a confined rocky canyon into an expansive hillside before being engulfed by a heavy storm. It begins with the character navigating a narrow passage between steep cliff faces and layered rock formations, where blue chiral crystals dot the ground and snow-capped peaks loom in the distance. As the camera emerges from the canyon, the environment opens into wide valleys and sweeping vistas of distant mountains, with the path shifting toward grassy patches and scattered rocks. The scene then darkens as a dramatic weather shift brings heavy rain, reducing visibility and casting a misty haze over the terrain. Finally, the camera follows the character uphill past sparse, gnarled trees as the distant peaks fade into the gray atmospheric blur.
